steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage ends with an incomplete sentence: mountain climbers presented edelweiss this way “in order to ______”. The answer must explain their self-interested motive — Scheidegger says they personally benefited from portraying edelweiss as dangerous and hard to reach.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "share their observations about the unusual characteristics of edelweiss with scientists.": sharing data with scientists benefits scientists, not the climbers themselves. ✗
  • "encourage more flower enthusiasts to explore the Swiss Alps.": bringing more visitors to the Alps benefits others, not the climbers personally. ✗
  • "make themselves appear brave and strong for being able to climb to difficult places where edelweiss supposedly grew.": by claiming edelweiss grew only in steep, icy, dangerous terrain and then reaching them, the climbers could present themselves as exceptionally courageous — a direct personal, self-interested gain. ✓
  • "prove that edelweiss were more common in the Swiss Alps than in other mountain regions in Europe.": proving flower distribution is unrelated to any personal benefit for the climbers. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
